title: Remove CycloneDX schema deprecation warnings

sources.reason: Current SBOM builder passes tools through the deprecated CycloneDX metadata field.
Existing SBOM regression tests define metadata and dependency expectations.
Committed SBOM baseline must match the updated CycloneDX representation.

riskAssessment.reason: The metadata representation and committed supply-chain baselines must remain schema-valid and deterministic.

executionDecision.reason: The warning source, compatible metadata representation, regression tests, and baselines are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Reviewers should confirm the updated metadata uses CycloneDX 1.5 components/services without changing dependency evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: SBOM generation emits producer metadata through the non-deprecated CycloneDX 1.5 components/services representation with no deprecation warnings.
Existing SBOM dependency relationships and deterministic committed baselines remain valid.
Regression tests cover the new metadata shape and the full quality and supply-chain checks pass.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The supply-chain quality gate emits three CycloneDX SchemaDeprecationWarning1Dot5 warnings because the SBOM generator serializes its producer as metadata.tools.
constraints: Remove the deprecation warnings without relaxing supply-chain checks or changing dependency relationships.
Keep generated SBOM, provenance, and release digest baselines deterministic.
intent.rationale: CycloneDX metadata.tools is deprecated from v1.5 onward; using the compatible component representation removes warning noise from a core governance gate.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: SBOM generation uses non-deprecated metadata components and remains deterministic
scenarioCoverage.reason: Verify the generated JSON shape and repeated generation.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Supply-chain SBOM, provenance, and release digest checks remain consistent
scenarioCoverage.reason: Run the supply-chain checks and full quality gate.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User confirmed continuation of the warning cleanup Work Item, including regenerated supply-chain baselines.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
